metadata.name: Handle a Subpoena for Employee Records

description: The company has received a legal subpoena for the personnel file of a current employee.

nodes.task_description: Receive the subpoena and immediately escalate it to the legal department.

expected_outcome.expected: HR representative receives the legal document and forwards it to the company's legal counsel.

nodes.task_description: Place a legal hold on the employee's records to prevent any changes or deletion.

expected_outcome.expected: Working with legal, the HR rep applies a legal hold flag in the HRIS.

nodes.task_description: Compile and provide the requested documents to the legal department for review before releasing them.

expected_outcome.expected: HR rep gathers all documents in the personnel file and provides them securely to the legal team.
